subject: Status review: poodle milestone in Madrid | Nikola Tesla | Q3 review | INIT-2637
body: Team, we are aligning the next phase of poodle work in Madrid. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Reference profile: Nikola Tesla. Reference initiative INIT-2637. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: planning, coordination.
